---
title: "임업통계_인사이트"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, date, description]
  image-height: 180px
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    sidebar: forestry
---

```{=html}
<style>
.forestry-header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a4a1a 0%, #2d6b2d 60%, #3a8c3a 100%);
  color: #f5f0e8;
  padding: 1.4rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.fh-left .fh-title {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem;
}
.fh-left .fh-title span { color: #a8d5a2; }
.fh-left .fh-sub {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  opacity: 0.85;
  margin: 0;
}
.fh-right {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-style: italic;
  border-left: 3px solid #a8d5a2;
  padding-left: 0.9rem;
  opacity: 0.88;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
</style>

<div class="forestry-header">
  <div class="fh-left">
    <div class="fh-title">🌲 <span>임업통계_인사이트</span></div>
    <div class="fh-sub">산림청·통계청 공공데이터를 기반으로 한 임업 통계 분석 및 시각화</div>
  </div>
  <div class="fh-right">
    국가 임업통계 데이터 × 통계전문가 인사이트<br>
    한국 임업의 현재와 미래를 데이터로 읽는다
  </div>
</div>
```
